description: Threadfin is a M3U proxy server for Plex, Emby, Jellyfin and any client and provider which supports the .TS and .M3U8 (HLS) streaming formats.
author: Fabio Tea
release_notes: Threadfin 1.2.37 clears XMLTV cache during updates and adds older glibc to the build process.
title: Threadfin
